data.body:
## Description

Write a bash test script at tests/scripts/test-doc-writer-agent.sh that verifies the dso:doc-writer agent file meets all behavioral requirements from story 9e22-2d3d.

### Test approach
Tests execute structural validation (file existence, frontmatter parsing) and behavioral verification (section presence, gate ordering, schema enforcement) against the agent file.

### Tests to write:
1. Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md and is non-empty
2. YAML frontmatter contains name: doc-writer, model: sonnet, description field
3. Decision engine gates appear in correct order: No-Op before User Impact before Architectural before Constraint
4. 4-tier documentation schema sections present (Navigation, User-Facing, Living Reference, ADRs)
5. Breakout heuristic section present with ~1500 token threshold and 3rd-level nesting trigger
6. CLAUDE.md read-only guard present (treats safeguard files as read-only, emits suggested-change report)
7. Truncation warning section present (logs warning when diff exceeds context)
8. Structured no-op report format present (reason string, gates evaluated, pass/fail per gate)
9. Agent reads both epic context and git diff as inputs

### File Impact
- Test: tests/scripts/test-doc-writer-agent.sh (create)
- Source: plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md (not yet created — tests must FAIL)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-doc-writer-agent.sh
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) when agent file does not exist
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-doc-writer-agent.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] .test-index entry added mapping plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md to tests/scripts/test-doc-writer-agent.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md' .test-index
